name: Veal Francese Sabatino's
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Veal scaloppine, pounded thin (enough for 12 pieces)
12 Thin slices Prosciutto ham, room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together eggs, half and half, seasonings, parsley, and cheese.
2. Dip the veal pieces into the batter and then into the bread crumbs. Shake off any excess.
3. Heat olive oil and butter in a large frying pan until hot.
4. Saute the veal until crisp on both sides. Remove from the skillet and add flour to the pan drippings, enough to form a smooth paste. Stir until smooth.
5. Pour in sherry, marsala, lemon juice, and chicken broth. Bring to a boil. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Strain the sauce over the cooked veal. Top each piece of veal with a piece of Prosciutto ham and a thin slice of lemon.
7. Serve. Note: Make sure the fat in the skillet is quite hot before adding the breaded pieces of veal, otherwise the crumbs will absorb the fat.
